business.name: Bloom Aesthetics Clinic
business.tagline: Your trusted partner in aesthetic wellness
business.parking: Free on-street parking available on Rose Lane after 6pm and all day Saturday. Nearest car park is Mayfair Q-Park (5 min walk).
business.accessibility: Step-free access available. Please inform us in advance if you require assistance.

botox.name: Botox (Anti-Wrinkle Injections)
botox.description: FDA-cleared botulinum toxin injections to soften fine lines and wrinkles. Popular areas include forehead, frown lines, and crow's feet.
botox.downtime: Minimal. Slight redness or swelling possible for 24–48 hours.

fillers.name: Dermal Fillers
fillers.description: Hyaluronic acid-based fillers to restore volume, define lips, and contour cheeks and jawline.
fillers.downtime: Mild swelling and bruising for 3–7 days. Avoid strenuous exercise for 24 hours.

skin_peels.name: Chemical Skin Peels
skin_peels.description: Exfoliating treatments to improve skin texture, tone, acne, and hyperpigmentation. We offer superficial, medium, and deep peels.
skin_peels.downtime: Superficial: 1–3 days flaking. Medium: 5–7 days peeling. Deep: up to 2 weeks.
skin_peels.results_last: Results improve with a course of 3–6 sessions
skin_peels.contraindications_note: Contraindications must be assessed at consultation. Not suitable during pregnancy.

microneedling.name: Microneedling (Collagen Induction Therapy)
microneedling.description: Uses fine needles to stimulate collagen production, improving skin texture, scarring, and overall skin quality.
microneedling.downtime: Redness for 24–72 hours. Avoid makeup for 24 hours post-treatment.
microneedling.results_last: Visible improvement after 3–6 sessions, spaced 4–6 weeks apart

led_therapy.name: LED Light Therapy
led_therapy.description: Non-invasive light treatment using different wavelengths to target acne, inflammation, and anti-ageing. Can be added onto other treatments.
led_therapy.results_last: Best results with a course of 6–8 sessions

consultation.name: Initial Consultation
consultation.description: A complimentary 30-minute consultation with one of our practitioners to assess your needs, discuss treatment options, and create a bespoke plan.
consultation.note: All injectable treatments require a prior consultation. Book via WhatsApp or website.

booking.cancellation_policy: 24-hour notice required for all cancellations and rescheduling. Late cancellations may incur a £30 fee.
booking.deposit: A 20% deposit is required to secure bookings for injectable treatments.
booking.new_client_note: New clients must complete a medical history form before their first appointment. This will be sent via email upon booking confirmation.

practitioners.name: Dr. Priya Sharma
practitioners.title: Lead Aesthetic Practitioner
practitioners.qualifications: MBBS, Level 7 Diploma in Aesthetic Medicine
practitioners.bio: Dr. Sharma has over 8 years of experience in aesthetic medicine and is passionate about delivering natural-looking results.

practitioners.name: Sophie Reeves
practitioners.title: Senior Aesthetic Nurse
practitioners.qualifications: RN, Level 5 Diploma in Aesthetic Nursing
practitioners.bio: Sophie specialises in skin health and has helped hundreds of clients achieve radiant, healthy skin through tailored treatment plans.

loyalty_programme.name: Bloom Rewards
loyalty_programme.description: Earn 1 point for every £1 spent. Redeem 100 points for £5 off your next treatment.
loyalty_programme.sign_up: Ask at reception or sign up on our website. Points are added automatically after each appointment.
loyalty_programme.referral_bonus: Refer a friend and both you and your friend receive £25 credit on your next visit.

gift_vouchers.how_to_buy: Purchase online at our website or in-clinic. Vouchers are valid for 12 months from the date of purchase.
gift_vouchers.note: Gift vouchers can be used for any treatment or consultation.

botox: Avoid touching or rubbing the treated area for 4 hours.
Avoid strenuous exercise, alcohol, and excessive heat (saunas, hot baths) for 24 hours.
Stay upright for 4 hours after treatment.
Do not lie face down for 4 hours.
Results take 3–14 days to fully appear.
fillers: Apply a cool compress if swelling occurs.
Avoid alcohol, aspirin, and ibuprofen for 24 hours.
Avoid facials, skin treatments, and laser for 2 weeks.
Sleep on your back for the first night.
microneedling: Keep the skin clean and moisturised.
Avoid makeup and active skincare ingredients (retinol, AHAs) for 24–48 hours.
Avoid sun exposure and tanning beds for 2 weeks.

escalation_triggers: Customer expresses a complaint or dissatisfaction
Customer uses angry, upset, or frustrated language
Customer asks about medical conditions, contraindications, or health-related safety
Customer requests to speak to a human, manager, or doctor
Customer asks a question that cannot be answered from this SOP
More than 2 consecutive questions that have no answer in the SOP
Customer mentions an adverse reaction or side effect after a previous treatment

frequently_asked_questions.question: Do you offer payment plans?
frequently_asked_questions.answer: We do not currently offer payment plans or finance options. We accept all major credit/debit cards, cash, and bank transfer.

frequently_asked_questions.question: Is parking available?
frequently_asked_questions.answer: Free on-street parking is available on Rose Lane after 6pm and all day Saturday. The nearest car park is Mayfair Q-Park, a 5-minute walk away.

frequently_asked_questions.question: How do I know which treatment is right for me?
frequently_asked_questions.answer: We offer a free 30-minute consultation with one of our practitioners who will assess your concerns and recommend the most suitable treatment plan.

frequently_asked_questions.question: Are your practitioners qualified?
frequently_asked_questions.answer: Yes. All treatments are carried out by Dr. Priya Sharma (MBBS, Level 7 Aesthetic Medicine) or Sophie Reeves (RN, Level 5 Aesthetic Nursing).

frequently_asked_questions.question: Do you have a loyalty programme?
frequently_asked_questions.answer: Yes! Our Bloom Rewards programme lets you earn 1 point per £1 spent. Every 100 points = £5 off a future treatment. Sign up online or at reception.
